title: RBAC Middleware with Role-to-Route Mapping in Echo
summary: Protect Echo routes with a fixed role-to-route mapping.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers an allowed role on a mapped route, a missing role header, a forbidden role, a shared route with multiple allowed roles, a parameterized Echo route pattern, an unmapped route, and whitespace plus case normalization.
